basic_details.job_title: IIM Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Manager, Research Associate Posts
basic_details.post_name: Centre of Excellence in Entrepreneurial Skills and Policy (CEESP)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIM Visakhapatnam) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 3 Centre of Excellence in Entrepreneurial Skills and Policy (CEESP) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIM Visakhapatnam website. The last date to submit the application form is 29-05-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit is 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation as per Government of India rules is applicable. Merit and relevant experience will be considered in deserving cases.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree for both positions. Post-Graduate degree is preferable for Manager and Research Associate. Specific disciplines are mentioned for preferable qualifications.
qualification.details: Manager, CEESP: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognised university. Post-Graduate degree / PGDM / MBA in Management, Social Work, Development Studies, Public Policy, Economics, or a related discipline (Preferable). Demonstrated full-time work experience in the field of entrepreneurship, social work, or the development sector. Prior experience in managing centres, programmes, or projects involving entrepreneurs, incubators, skill development, MSMEs, or livelihoods. Experience of working with academic institutions, government bodies, NGOs, or CSR programmes in the entrepreneurship / skilling ecosystem. Experience in grant writing, fundraising, and partnership development (Desirable). Research Associate, CEESP: Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognised university. Post-Graduate degree in Management, Economics, Social Sciences, Public Policy, Development Studies, Social Work, Commerce, or a related discipline (Preferable). Prior experience in academic or policy research, case writing, fieldwork, or publication support in an institute of higher education, think-tank, or research organisation (Preferable). Exposure to entrepreneurship, skilling, MSME, or livelihoods-related research will be an added advantage.

salary_details.pay_scale: Manager: Up to ₹ 1,00,000 per month. Research Associate: Up to ₹ 41,000 per month.
salary_details.details: Manager, CEESP: Up to ₹ 1,00,000 per month Research Associate, CEESP: Up to ₹ 41,000 per month

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Personal interview (online or physical mode) Written test and/or presentation (at the discretion of the Selection Committee)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Visakhapatnam to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Visakhapatnam recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIM Visakhapatnam recruitment is 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the CEESP posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies available for the Centre of Excellence in Entrepreneurial Skills and Policy (CEESP) posts at IIM Visakhapatnam.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: A Bachelor's degree in any discipline is the minimum qualification required for both the Manager and Research Associate positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 35 years, with applicable age relaxations as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Manager, CEESP post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Manager, CEESP post is up to ₹ 1,00,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate, CEESP post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Associate, CEESP post is up to ₹ 41,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting of applications, followed by a personal interview, and potentially a written test and/or presentation.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the IIM Visakhapatnam recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply online through the official website of IIM Visakhapatnam before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis.
